===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# [[abnormal]] or [[bizarre]] thing or [[phenomenon]]
#* {{zh-x|妖 由 人 興{xīng} 也。人 無 釁 焉，妖 不 自 作，人 棄 常 則 妖 興。|Monsters and monstrous events take their rise from men. If men afford no cause for them, they do not arise of themselves. When men abandon the constant course of virtue, then monstrosities appear.|ref=Zuozhuan-L}}
#* {{quote-book|zh|year=2011|author=zh:胡寶談<t:Hu Baotan>|title=zh:弄堂}}
#*: {{zh-q|事體 老 妖 個。|tr=sh:6zy thi&6lau+1iau gheq|It's quite an odd happenstance.|SH}}
# [[demon]]; [[goblin]]
#: {{zh-x|貓妖|cat goblin}}
# [[evil]] and [[fraudulent]]
#: {{zh-x|妖術|witchcraft; sorcery}}
#: {{zh-x|妖言惑眾|to deceive people with lies and fallacies}}
# {{lb|zh|literary}} [[gorgeous]]; [[beautiful]]; [[charming]]
#* {{zh-x|美女 妖 且 閑，采 桑 歧路 間。|That beautiful woman is '''charming''' and graceful, she is plucking mulberries at the crossways.|ref=3rd century, {{w|Cao Zhi}}, {{lw|zh|s:zh:美女篇|美女篇}} ("On a Beautiful Woman"), translated by Wu (1998)<ref>Wu Fusheng (1998). ''The Poetics of Decadence: Chinese Poetry of the Southern Dynasties and Late Tang Periods''. Albany: State University of New York Press. pp. 47-48</ref>|CL}}
# {{lb|zh|chiefly of women}} [[bizarrely]] [[dressed]] or behaving [[frivolously]]
#: {{zh-x|妖裡妖氣|seductive and bewitching}}
# {{lb|zh|Cantonese|vulgar|minced oath}} [[yuck]]! ({{n-g|used in place of its near-homophone {{zh-l|屌|tr=diu2}}}})

====Compounds====

|{{ja-r|妖気|ようき}}: a [[weird]] or [[unearthly]] [[feeling]]
|{{ja-r|妖姫|ようき}}: a [[seductively]] [[beautiful]] [[princess]], a [[distractingly]] [[attractive]] woman
|{{ja-r|妖狐|ようこ}}: a [[demon]] [[fox]], [[kitsune]]

|{{ja-r|妖猫|ようびょう}}: a [[demon]] [[cat]], such as the [[bakeneko]], [[nekomata]] or [[kasha]]
|{{ja-r|妖教|ようきょう}}: a [[religion]] that leads people [[astray]]; [[heresy]]
|{{ja-r|妖孽|ようげつ}}: a [[strange]] [[calamity]]; an [[omen]] or [[portent]] of [[misfortune]]
|{{ja-r|妖言|ようげん}}, {{ja-r|妖%言|およずれ%ごと}}: a [[malicious]] [[rumor]]

|{{ja-r|妖法|ようほう}}

|{{ja-r|妖星|ようせい}}: an [[inauspicious]] or [[unlucky]] [[star]]
|{{ja-r|妖精|ようせい}}: [[fairy]]
|{{ja-r|妖精症|ようせいしょう}}: {{sense|medical}} [[leprechaunism]], a manifestation of secondary insulin resistance
|{{ja-r|妖美|ようび}}: [[seductively]] [[beautiful]]
|{{ja-r|妖婦|ようふ}}: a [[seductress]], a [[vamp]]
|{{ja-r|妖変|ようへん}}: a [[strange]] [[accident]], [[emergency]], or [[calamity]]
|{{ja-r|妖魔|ようま}}: a [[monster]], a [[demon]]
|{{ja-r|妖冶|ようや|rom=-}}, {{ja-r|妖艶|ようや|rom=-}}, {{ja-r|妖婉|ようや}}: [[bewitchingly]] [[attractive]]; [[seductive]]
|{{ja-r|妖厄神|ようやくじん}}: a [[god]] of [[disaster]] and [[calamity]]; a god of [[disease]] and [[misfortune]]
|{{ja-r|妖霊|ようれい}}: an [[evil]] [[spirit]]; a [[phantom]]

|{{ja-r|妖麗|ようれい|rom=-}}, {{ja-r|妖美|ようれい}}: [[seductively]] [[beautiful]]
